underlying_goal: Set up a complete Obsidian PKM vault for KALFA Laravel documentation with Templater templates, Obsidian sync, and Git integration
friction_detail: Git repository corruption required extensive manual intervention; user interrupted and self-directed Git fix; sync process had authentication challenges
brief_summary: User successfully built a complete KALFA documentation vault with PKM templates, sync, and Git integration, though required manual troubleshooting of repository corruption issues.
